SEARCH
Package io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi

Class SpiDispatcher

java.lang.Object
io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher
public final class SpiDispatcher extends Object
Loaded once per processor round, this class discovers all registered FieldTransformer and FormContributor implementations via ServiceLoader and dispatches to them during FormSpec generation.

Usage in the InputSpec processor


 SpiDispatcher spi = new SpiDispatcher(messager);

 // For each element (field or interface method):
 Optional<TransformResult> result = spi.tryTransform(fieldCtx);
 if (result.isPresent()) {
     formContextBuilder.addTransformedField(
         result.get().ref(),
         result.get().json(),
         fieldCtx.fieldName()
     );
     formFields.add(result.get().json());
 } else {
     // default InputSpec generation
     formContextBuilder.addDefaultField(fieldCtx.fieldName());
     formFields.add(defaultGenerator.generate(fieldCtx));
 }

 // After all fields:
 DefaultFormContext formCtx = formContextBuilder.build();

 for (String json : spi.collectAdditionalFields(formCtx)) {
     formFields.add(json);
 }
 for (String json : spi.collectAdditionalCrossConstraints(formCtx)) {
     crossConstraints.add(json);
 }

 // Merge SPI bundle entries into the skeleton before writing it
 bundle.putAll(spi.collectBundleEntries(formCtx));
 writeBundleSkeleton(formId, bundle);

  • Constructor Details

    • SpiDispatcher

      public SpiDispatcher(Messager messager)

  • Method Details

    • tryTransform

      public Optional<SpiDispatcher.TransformResult> tryTransform(FieldContext ctx)
      Attempts to find a FieldTransformer that claims the given field.

      The returned SpiDispatcher.TransformResult carries both the generated JSON and the bundle entries contributed by the transformer, so the processor can merge them into the bundle skeleton in a single pass.

      Returns:
      a TransformResult if a transformer claimed the field, empty otherwise

    • collectAdditionalFields

      public List<String> collectAdditionalFields(FormContext ctx)
      Collects additional InputFieldSpec JSON strings from all active FormContributors.

    • collectAdditionalCrossConstraints

      public List<String> collectAdditionalCrossConstraints(FormContext ctx)
      Collects additional CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON strings from all active FormContributors.

    • collectBundleEntries

      public Map<String,String> collectBundleEntries(FormContext ctx)
      Collects all i18n bundle entries (key → default text) from all active FormContributors.

      The InputSpec processor must call this method after collectAdditionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and collectAdditionalCrossConstraints(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext), then merge the result into its bundle map before writing the skeleton: 

         bundle.putAll(spi.collectBundleEntries(formCtx));
   writeBundleSkeleton(formId, bundle, origin);

      This ensures that every i18nKey emitted by a contributor appears in META-INF/difsp/i18n/{formId}.properties.

      Returns:
      merged map of all contributor bundle entries; never null

    • hasExtensions

      public boolean hasExtensions()
      Returns true if at least one FieldTransformer or FormContributor is registered. Useful for skipping SPI overhead when no extensions are present.
